prompt: Restore the missing atom in the masked region to complete the 2D material’s atomic structure.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Within the dark triangular void located in the upper-left section, as precisely outlined by image 2, generate a new atom. This new atom should be photorealistic and seamlessly match the appearance, size, brightness, and hexagonal arrangement of the surrounding atoms to complete the 2D material’s atomic structure.
objects: Multiple atoms in a hexagonal arrangement
A new atom in the upper-left section, matching surrounding atoms in appearance, size, and brightness
Dark triangular void in the upper-left section (should not be present)
